title: Saro´s Creative Tab
description: You can add All Items you want to your own Custom Creative Tabs
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Creative_Tab/BH_SCT_header2.webp)
![over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Creative_Tab/BH_SCT_overview.webp)

The **Saros Creative Tab** mod adds a custom creative tab to Minecraft, allowing players to easily access essential vanilla items like the Command Block and Barrier, which are not available in the default creative inventory.

**For version 1.20.1 and above**, this mod features a powerful **Dynamic Custom Tab Management System** that allows server administrators to create, manage, and configure multiple custom creative tabs through in-game commands!

![fetures](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Creative_Tab/BH_SCT_features.webp)

## Features (Version 1.19.4 and earlier)
- **Custom Creative Tab**: A new tab named "Saros Creative Tab" is added to the creative inventory, this tab adds Vanilla Items like Command blocks and more.

## Features (Version 1.20.1+)
- **Dynamic Tab Creation**: Create unlimited custom creative tabs with unique names and icons
- **Command-Based Management**: Full control through intuitive in-game commands
- **Item Organization**: Add, remove, and organize items in your custom tabs
- **Permission System**: Configurable permission levels for tab management (per-tab and global)
- **Server Synchronization**: All players see the same custom tabs configured by administrators
- **Persistent Storage**: Custom tabs are saved and persist across server restarts
- **Flexible Configuration**: Configure default permissions and behavior through config files

### Commands (1.20.1+)
- `/customtab create <id> <displayName> <icon>` - Create a new custom tab
- `/customtab delete <id>` - Delete a custom tab
- `/customtab list` - List all custom tabs
- `/customtab add <tabId> <item>` - Add an item to a tab
- `/customtab remove <tabId> <item>` - Remove an item from a tab
- `/customtab items <tabId>` - List all items in a tab
- `/customtab rename <tabId> <newName>` - Rename a tab
- `/customtab seticon <tabId> <icon>` - Change a tab's icon
- `/customtab setpermission <tabId> <permission>` - Set tab-specific permissions
- `/customtab reload` - Reload tabs and configuration from files
- `/customtab help` - Display command help

### Permission Levels (1.20.1+)
- **EVERYONE** - All players can manage the tab (default for tab modification)
- **OP_LEVEL_2** - Only operators with level 2+ (default for tab creation/deletion)
- **OP_LEVEL_3** - Only operators with level 3+
- **OP_LEVEL_4** - Only operators with level 4 (server owner)

Permissions can be configured globally in the config file or per-tab using commands.

**Note:** Changes to tabs require rejoining the world to take effect in the creative inventory.

![screen](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Creative_Tab/BH_SCT_screenshot.webp)


![supported](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Creative_Tab/BH_SCT_supported.webp)
